name: PT Asuransi Kresna Mitra Tbk
summary: PT Asuransi Kresna Mitra Tbk engages in general insurance and reinsurance business in Indonesia. The company offers property, motor vehicle, marine cargo and hull, liability, health, personal accident, burglary, moveable assets, money, hole-in-one, billboard, and sharia insurance, as well as engineering insurance, including erection all risks, contractor all risks, and machinery breakdown, and surety bonds. It also provides other insurance products, such as earthquake, workmen's compensation, comprehensive general, product and public liability, professional indemnity, and employer's liability. The company was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
